sentiment.summary: Markets rally as oil eases from Iran war highs and Fed holds rates steady, but inflation risk and geopolitical tension keep the outlook uncertain.

insights.text: Fed holds at 3.5–3.75% — stocks cheer, but the fine print matters. S&P +1.01%, NASDAQ +1.22%, VIX crushed -12.5% as oil retreats -1.6% from Iran war highs. Rate cut outlook trimmed from two 2026 cuts to one — watch Powell's press conference for tone.

BTC pulls back to $74,075 — barely above your $73,135 cost basis. Hit $75,912 six-week high on March 17 before fading. Rally was derivatives-led, not organic buying. Iran uncertainty and Fed tone are key. Hold but watch for clean break above $76K to add.

Rocket Lab at ~$75 — 21% above your $62 cost basis, selling off on high volume. Record Q4 revenue $180M (+38% YoY), backlog +73% to $1.85B. Optical Support acquisition adds precision optics. Today's high-volume drop is likely profit-taking — fundamentals remain excellent.

EchoStar at $112.50 — just below your $114.33 cost basis. Satellite comms sector under pressure with no near-term catalysts. Debt-heavy balance sheet in a high-rate, Iran-driven inflation environment is a concern. Watch for any strategic update, deal, or merger news.

T1 Energy at $7.79 — 16% above your $6.73 cost basis. Crossed its 200-day MA (then $4.91) on March 10 — a strong technical breakout. Analyst avg target $10.71. US solar and battery supply chain buildout tailwinds intact. Still meaningful upside if execution holds.

Seagate at ~$414 — 7.8% below your $448.98 cost basis. Still underwater despite the AI data center storage thesis. Q2 revenue was +22% YoY with $607M FCF — fundamentals aren't broken. Macro and rate uncertainty are the drag. Watch next earnings for HDD cycle recovery.

Telesat surged 19% to ~$42 on March 17 — 26% above your $33.33 cost basis. Big move on elevated volume in the LEO satellite sector. Lightspeed constellation launch late 2026 is the key catalyst. Consider locking partial profits — these runs can reverse hard in small caps.

BigBear.ai at $3.95 — 56% below your $9.02 cost basis. Q4 revenue down 38% YoY. 2026 guidance of $135–165M is modest. $462M cash buys runway but the core business is shrinking. Recovery thesis is fading fast — reassess position size or cut the loss.

Nebius drops 10.4% to $116 on $3.75B convertible note — below your $131.12 cost basis. The $27B Meta AI infrastructure deal is transformational long-term. Dilution fears are causing the panic sell. If you believe in the AI infrastructure build, this could be a dip worth buying.

Oklo at $60.53 — 52% below your $125 cost basis. Real catalysts today: DOE approved NSDA at Idaho National Lab, NRC granted Atomic Alchemy first materials license ever. Down 18% YTD but analyst avg target $113. Long-duration nuclear bet — hold only with full conviction.

Navitas near your $10 cost basis — but CFO just sold 98K shares at $10.78 on March 17. Insider selling is a red flag. Rosenblatt rates neutral with $7 target. NVIDIA GTC 2026 showcase could pop it short-term — but that $7 downside scenario is real. Watch closely.
